stemHtml: Which of the following conditions are most favourable to the formation of mountain waves?

options.a: Unstable air at mountain top altitude and a wind at least 20 knots blowing across the mountain ridge.
options.b: Moist unstable air at mountain top and wind of less than 5 knots blowing across the mountain ridge.
options.c: Either stable or unstable air at mountain top and a wind of at least 30 knots blowing parallel to the mountain ridge.
options.d: Stable air at mountain top altitude and a wind at least 20 knots blowing across the mountain ridge.
